items.name_cn:
P🆕【Premium Original】🔥【Exclusive Background】🌈Elephant Print
New Elephant Print NIKai Front Flap Bag, accented with metal LE CASSANDRE, featuring convertible leather and chain shoulder straps. The popular NIKI Elephant Print is a favorite among many stars and influencers, hard to find in stores. The globally popular NIKI features a large capacity and elephant print cowhide! The craftsmanship is very complex, offering you a unique visual effect! An absolute must-have style!👑
Model: 633178
Size: 28X20X8.5cm

items.name_cn:
P🔥 🆕 New Arrival 👏【Exclusive Background】
Elephant Print (Mini Size)
🌈 A new member of the Niki family, the mini is simply too cool 😎. The bag shape is beautiful with no flaws; soft sheepskin creates a retro yet stylish look. Crossbody or underarm styles are both great, suitable for both men and women. Combines fashion and functionality. Comfortable and stylish to wear, with ample capacity for daily outings 👍
Model: 828736
Size: 18×12.5×5cm

items.name_cn:
Caramel Calfskin with Canvas
Extraordinary lightweight texture, named for the exquisite Y logo inspired by the fashion house's archival designs.
Elegant and structured, the handle features a hollow-out design and comes with an adjustable detachable shoulder strap for various carrying options.
Gives a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Unisex, suitable as a briefcase or travel tote, with extra-large capacity.
Model: 800224
Dimensions: 23×29.5×3-8.5cm
Handle Height: 7cm
Shoulder Strap Length: 48cm

items.name_cn:
Olive Calfskin with Cotton Linen
24ss New Shopping Bag
A unique fusion of art and personality. Y always has a unique vision, winning the hearts of top fashion trends. The Y-shaped calfskin design is eye-catching, giving a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Extra-large capacity, fits iPads and laptops. Retro minimalist design, great for posing, stylish and photogenic!
Model: 817602
Dimensions: 38-50×33×16cm

items.name_cn:
Lucky Bag Woven Bag 🏖️
Best-seller alert! Jamie's Lucky Bag is updated with raffia material. This bag is chillier than the lambskin, full of vacation vibes. Incredible capacity! Fits sunscreen, sunglasses, and straw hats. Unique woven texture, recording the warmth of the sun. Every photo radiates leisure and comfort!
Model No.: 833948
Size: 27×29×11cm

🌸 #Hobo# Large Raffia Bucket Bag
Summer's favorite raffia bucket bag!
Hawaiian style, the ultimate relaxed raffia bucket bag! Classic logo hook bucket shape paired with raffia weave, full of French lazy style. Can be carried by hand or on the shoulder, looks super nice on, instantly Instagram-worthy!

Size: 20x25x16CM
